bundle.shortDescription: A Typst visual editor with live SVG preview.
bundle.longDescription: Typst Studio is a native desktop Typst editor: a Monaco code editor on the left and a real-time SVG preview on the right. It embeds the official typst compiler (typst, typst-svg, typst-pdf, typst-render, typst-kit) directly in a Tauri 2 + Rust backend for millisecond-level incremental compilation, with full PDF and PNG export.
